explanations.3: This declares that this file belongs to the 'Cavo' namespace, which is like putting your code in a labeled folder to avoid naming conflicts with other people's code.
explanations.5: This manually includes the Product.php file so we can use the Product class; in modern PHP you'd usually use autoloading instead.
explanations.13: PHP_EOL is a built-in constant that represents a newline character (the thing that makes text go to the next line), and it works across different operating systems.
